purpose: Map arifOS governance verdicts ↔ A2A wire states; block Ghost Tasks without contextLineage
ghost_task_definition: A task, message, or VAULT seal without real session_id (+ context_id) bound to an originating session — seals #9902, #84, #85 class

mandatory_fields.session_id: required on every task/* and message/* create; rejects unknown/session-unknown
mandatory_fields.context_id: A2A contextId; bound 1:1 to session_id in contextLineage map

gatekeeper.missing_session_id: HTTP 400 / JSON-RPC INVALID_REQUEST — no task row created (not a silent ghost)
gatekeeper.vault_without_lineage: writeSeal throws GHOST_TASK_BLOCKED; seal_chain INV-4 downgrades SEAL→HOLD
